summary:
Perfect! The test script now passes. The issue was that the Nginx configuration was proxying requests to port `5001`, but the Flask application was running on port `5000`. By changing the `proxy_pass` directive in `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default` from `http://127.0.0.1:5001` to `http://127.0.0.1:5000`, the connection between Nginx and the Flask backend is now working correctly.

The needle in the haystack was the port mismatch in the Nginx configuration file.
